title: Senior Software Engineer - Ninjacart Digital Technologies - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Ninjacart Digital Technologies - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the Ninjacart Digital Technologies family as a Senior Software Engineer in Aurangabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Ninjacart Digital Technologies:
Ninjacart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart Digital Technologies!
